description:
To Book a Free Call With Our Insurance Experts:

Health Insurance : https://px2.in/OC2bn4z 
Term Insurance : https://px2.in/rDHNZDf #iciciprudential  #lifeinsurance #signature 
ICICI Prudential Life Signature Plan ek advanced unit-linked insurance plan (ULIP) hai jo life insurance aur investment dono ka combination deta hai. Agar aap apni family ke financial future ko secure karna chahte hain aur sath hi apne wealth ko systematically grow karna chahte hain, toh yeh plan aapke liye ek perfect choice hai.

Is plan ke kuch key highlights hain:

Unlimited Fund Switching: Aap apne investment ko alag-alag funds mein bina kisi extra cost ke transfer kar sakte hain.
Systematic Withdrawal Options: Aap apne zarurat ke hisaab se partial withdrawals kar sakte hain.
Whole Life Policy Benefits: Yeh policy aapko lifelong protection aur financial flexibility deti hai.
Tax Benefits: Aapko premium aur maturity amount par tax benefits milte hain, jo aapke overall returns ko aur attractive banate hain.
Agar aap apne financial goals ko efficiently plan karna chahte hain aur apni family ko financially secure rakhna chahte hain, toh ICICI Pru Signature Plan ke baare mein puri jankari ke liye yeh video zarur dekhein! 😊

#ICICIPruSignature #Insurance #Investment #FinancialFreedom #ULIP #iciciprudential 



To Book a Free Call With Our Insurance Experts:

Health Insurance : https://px2.in/OC2bn4z

comments.text: What will happen if i didn't pay the premium installment?
comments.author: @MxryGxite

comments.text:
If you haven’t paid premiums for 3 continuous years, and you stop paying:

The policy will go into a "discontinued" state.

Your fund value will be moved to a Discontinued Policy (DP) Fund, where it will earn a lower return (around 4% p.a. as per IRDAI rules).

You cannot withdraw or revive it until the 5-year lock-in period ends.

comments.text: If you have paid 5 premiums for ICICI Prudential Signature, you can withdraw your money as ULIPs have a 5-year lock-in period. Once this period is completed, you can surrender the policy and receive the fund value. However, check for any surrender charges that may apply. Also, withdrawals after 5 years are tax-free, but if done earlier, previous tax benefits under Section 80C may be reversed. Before proceeding, review your policy document or check with ICICI Prudential for the exact payout amount and any deductions.

comments.text: I joined 1 year ago I invested 36000 but now value 30000 not increase every time can I stop this policy?
comments.author: @sameershaams

comments.text: If your policy is under a lock-in period (usually 5 years), stopping it now may incur surrender charges. Market-linked policies like ULIPs fluctuate, so exiting during a low phase can lock in losses. These plans are designed for long-term growth, so consider staying invested if it aligns with your goals. Review your policy terms or consult your advisor for guidance.
comments.author: @PolicyXcomindia

comments.text: Free look view cancellation me kitna deduction krke milega
comments.author: @krishangoutam

comments.text:
ICICI Prudential Life Signature policy ke free-look cancellation par, aapko premium ka refund milega lekin kuch charges deduct honge. Ye charges hote hain:

Stamp Duty Charges
Medical Examination Charges (agar koi medical test hua ho policy issue karte samay).
Pro-rata Risk Premium (jitne din tak policy active rahi hai uska risk cover charge).
Baaki premium amount aapke account me refund kar diya jata hai. Free-look period usually policy ke issue hone ke 15 din ke andar hota hai (agar policy offline purchase hui hai) aur 30 din (agar policy online ya distance mode se li gayi ho).
comments.author: @PolicyXcomindia

comments.text: Death benefit milta hai

comments.text: Yes, the ICICI Prudential Signature Plan has a death benefit. If the insured dies during the policy term, the beneficiary or nominee will receive the death benefit.
